heading: Tuesday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely early east of the Greens, and farther west near the Massachusetts border, otherwise scattered, and all tapering off before midnight. Areas of fog. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50 north, low to mid 50s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming west to northwest and diminishing overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. A rising chance of morning showers in New York, then scattered afternoon in the south, and numerous north; a thunderstorm possible. Highs from the upper 50s to mid 60s north, and upper 60s to mid 70s in the south. Winds from the south to southeast at 5 to 10 mph, except easterly 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Scattered evening showers, and maybe a thunderstorm, then chance of a shower overnight. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some upper 50s in the south. Winds becoming light and variable.
